overall.description: Cinematic drone footage from a video game showcasing the Kongyo-ji temple complex. The clip begins with a low-altitude exploration of a red arched bridge over a rocky autumn gorge, then transitions to a high aerial view revealing the temple nestled among snow-covered mountain peaks and dense forests.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain stream gorge with traditional red bridge

agents.ego_description: slowly circling around the temple complex and red bridge, rising from stream level to medium height while surveying the traditional architecture

entered.detail: traditional Japanese wooden arch bridge painted bright red spanning the rocky gorge
steep rocky cliff faces with moss and dry vegetation surrounding the stream bed
large traditional wooden temple structure with curved tiled roof and elevated platform
worn stone staircase leading up the hillside to the temple entrance
sparse trees with autumn foliage and bare branches

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a low-angle drone shot circling a rocky mountain gorge. A vibrant red arched bridge spans the dry stream bed, while traditional wooden temple buildings with curved roofs perch on the right hillside. The camera slowly rises and orbits, revealing stone staircases and autumn vegetation under clear blue skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain temple complex with forested peaks

events.description: cuts from ground-level gorge view to high aerial perspective revealing the full mountain landscape
season transitions to winter with snow covering the mountain peaks, temple roofs, and surrounding forest

agents.ego_description: high-altitude drone circling the entire temple complex, slowly panning to reveal the snow-covered mountain landscape and dense pine forests

entered.detail: distant mountain range completely covered in snow under bright sunlight
thick evergreen forest covering the mountain slopes surrounding the temple
smaller traditional buildings visible in the distance up the mountain path

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a high aerial view revealing the temple complex nestled within a vast snow-covered mountain range. The red bridge now appears small in the distance, surrounded by white-capped peaks and dense evergreen forests. The camera continues its slow orbit, showcasing the full scale of the traditional architecture against the winter landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from an intimate view of a rocky autumn gorge into a sweeping aerial vista of a snow-covered mountain range. It begins with a low-angle orbit around a vibrant red arched bridge spanning a dry stream bed, with traditional wooden temple buildings perched on the adjacent hillside. As the camera slowly rises, the perspective expands to reveal stone staircases and autumn vegetation under clear blue skies. The scene then shifts into a high aerial view where the red bridge recedes into the distance, becoming a small detail within a vast landscape of white-capped peaks and dense evergreen forests. Finally, the camera continues its wide orbit to showcase the full scale of the temple complex nestled against the frozen winter wilderness.
